articles.title: White Sox rookie Braden Montgomery becomes fifth player ever to hit walk-off homer in his Major League debut
articles.description: White Sox rookie Braden Montgomery hit a walk-off homer in his MLB debut, becoming just the fifth player ever to accomplish the feat in his first game.
articles.content:
Chicago White Sox rookie Braden Montgomery had just about the best Major League Baseball debut imaginable on Tuesday night.
